title: The Fog at Blackwater Docks
summary: A missing courier, a sealed crate, and too many witnesses who saw nothing.

memoryCards.title: Blackwater Docks
memoryCards.content: The docks are always foggy at night; locals blame old ship fires.

start.prompt: Night. Fog curls around the pilings. A lantern swings on a hook, unmanned. The harbormaster's office is dark—except for one thin line of light under the door.
